title: Evelyn 16x
description: A blue galaxy themed PvP texturepack available for 1.8, 1.20 and 1.21+
body: Evelyn 16x is a blue galaxy themed PvP texturepack available for 1.8, 1.20 and 1.21 and Bedrock Edition (Bedrock Download:  https://app.mediafire.com/folder/0fzq89d7whvtl/Evelyn+16x). The pack changes all of the environmental blocks like the dirt and stone blocks and the relevant pvp items like armor, tools, the ender pearl and fireball, bow and more. It also adds custom particles and a custom sky. The pack is supposed to improve the visual aspects of your game.
